title: Financial Analytics
subtitle: Sotho Minigrid Portfolio (SMP)
description: ARPU, revenue trends & per-site financial breakdown
noData: No ARPU data available. Ensure account history data exists in the CC database.
arpuTrendSub: Average Revenue Per User (LSL) per quarter, with total revenue on secondary axis
monthlyArpuSub: Average Revenue Per User (LSL) per month, colored by quarter
revenueBySiteSub: Stacked breakdown of LSL revenue per quarter by concession
arpuBySiteSub: Average Revenue Per User by concession for the latest quarter
revenueBreakdown: Revenue Breakdown by Site and Quarter
arpuDefinition: ARPU = Total Quarterly Revenue / Active Customers in Quarter
